title: Don't Drop Everything
short_description: If You like this, give a thumbs up! Hint: When a player dies, The player must have amulets, A will drop. Players into a state of the soul after death, not drop all the items.

title: 姐姐救救我(Sister, save me
short_description: 此mod是我花钱去定制的，我本身不会制作mod，想着或许有人也需要放出来给大家玩。 如果对你有所帮助，给我点个赞和收藏吧，我看着开心w 此mod可以让你在玩其他人物的时候，使用阿比盖尔之花，虽然主要是为了让其他角色也能使用阿比，但关闭①，②选项后，也可以单纯作为玩温蒂时，使用阿比盖尔的加强使用。 同时可和原版的药剂与姐妹骨灰坛搭配。 ①让阿比盖尔之花给其他角色绑定使用(可关闭) ②其他角色开局初始物品增加阿比盖尔之花(可关闭) ③血量提升︰100>300，300>600，600>1000，另有阿比无法被攻击

title: Craft Pot [DS, ROG, SW, DST]
short_description: Client mod that adds intuitive cook assisting interface to crock pot. Doesn't matter what server you join, modded crock pots, modded recipes, this mod serves them all on a plate and helps you cook whatever your heart desires by displaying the exact recipe.

title: Minimap HUD
short_description: Adds a minimap to the HUD The minimap is fully functional; it can be zoomed using the zoom map binds (defaulted to the mousewheel) and can be panned by clicking and dragging. The minimap can be collapsed by hovering over it and clicking the "Close Minimap"

title: Insight (Show Me+)
short_description: Thank you for 1 million subscribers! I never expected this many users. Thank you for your support! Background Information Inspired by Show Me. Because I like to know everything about everything. Show me was nice, but it was inaccurate/weird for some things
